flowchart:
flowchart TB
    %% Node shapes
    A[Rectangle] --> B(Rounded)
    B --> C([Stadium])
    C --> D[[Subroutine]]
    D --> E[(Database)]
    E --> F((Circle))
    F --> G>Asymmetric]
    G --> H{Diamond}
    H --> I{{Hexagon}}
    I --> J[/Parallelogram/]
    J --> K[\Parallelogram alt\]
    K --> L[/Trapezoid\]
    L --> M[\Trapezoid alt/]
    M --> N@{ shape: circle, label: 'Double circle' }
    %% Link types
    A --- O[No arrowhead]
    A --> P[Arrow]
    A --x Q[Cross]
    A --o R[Circle end]
    A <--> S[Bidirectional]
    A <--x T[Bidirectional cross]
    A o--o U[Bidirectional circle]
    %% Link styles
    A -.-> V[Dotted]
    A ==> W[Thick]
    A ~~~X[Invisible]
    %% Labels
    A -->|label| Y[Labeled]
    A -- text --> Z[Text link]
    %% Subgraphs
    subgraph sg1[Subgraph One]
        direction LR
        s1[A] --> s2[B]
    end
    subgraph sg2
        s3[C] --> s4[D]
    end
    sg1 --> sg2
    %% Styles and classes
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    classDef green fill:#9f9,stroke:#090
    class B green
    %% Click
    click A callback
sequence:
sequenceDiagram
    %% Participants and actors
    participant Alice
    participant Bob
    actor Charlie
    participant D as Dave
    actor E as Eve
    %% Message types
    Alice->>Bob: Solid arrow
    Alice-->>Bob: Dotted arrow
    Alice-xBob: Solid cross
    Alice--xBob: Dotted cross
    Alice-)Bob: Async arrow
    Alice--)Bob: Async dotted
    %% Activation
    Alice->>+Bob: Activate
    Bob->>-Alice: Deactivate
    %% Notes
    Note right of Alice: Right note
    Note left of Bob: Left note
    Note over Alice,Bob: Over note
    %% Loops and alt
    loop Every minute
        Alice->>Bob: Ping
    end
    alt Success
        Bob->>Alice: OK
    else Failure
        Bob->>Alice: Error
    end
    opt Optional
        Alice->>Charlie: Maybe
    end
    %% Parallel
    par Alice to Bob
        Alice->>Bob: Hello
    and Alice to Charlie
        Alice->>Charlie: Hi
    end
    %% Critical
    critical Establish connection
        Alice->>Bob: Connect
    option Network timeout
        Bob->>Alice: Retry
    end
    %% Break
    break when error
        Alice->>Bob: Abort
    end
    %% Autonumber
    autonumber
    Alice->>Bob: Numbered
    %% Boxes
    box Group
        participant F
        participant G
    end
    F->>G: In box
class:
classDiagram
    direction TB
    %% Basic class
    class Animal {
        +String name
        -int age
        #float weight
        ~String internal
        +getName() String
        -setAge(int age) void
        #abstract move()*
        +$staticMethod()
    }
    %% Inheritance
    class Dog {
        +String breed
        +bark() void
    }
    Animal <|-- Dog : extends
    %% Interfaces and abstract
    class Flyable {
        <<interface>>
        +fly() void
    }
    class AbstractBase {
        <<abstract>>
    }
    class ServiceClass {
        <<service>>
    }
    class EnumType {
        <<enumeration>>
        VALUE1
        VALUE2
    }
    %% All relationship types
    class A
    class B
    class C
    class D
    class E
    class F
    class G
    A <|-- B : inheritance
    A *-- C : composition
    A o-- D : aggregation
    A --> E : association
    A ..> F : dependency
    A ..|> G : realization
    A -- B : link
    A <|.. C : interface impl
    %% Cardinality
    class Order
    class LineItem
    Order "1" *-- "1..*" LineItem : contains
    %% Namespace
    namespace Animals {
        class Cat {
            +purr()
        }
    }
    %% Notes
    note for Dog "This is a dog class"
    %% Annotations
    class Annotated {
        <<annotation>>
    }
    %% Click
    click Animal href "https://example.com"
state:
stateDiagram-v2
    %% Basic states
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]
    %% Transitions with labels
    Still --> Stopped: stop event
    Stopped --> [*]
    %% Composite states
    state Moving {
        direction LR
        Slow --> Fast: accelerate
        Fast --> Slow: brake
    }
    %% Fork and join
    state fork_state <<fork>>
    [*] --> fork_state
    fork_state --> State2
    fork_state --> State3
    state join_state <<join>>
    State2 --> join_state
    State3 --> join_state
    join_state --> State4
    %% Choice
    state if_state <<choice>>
    Still --> if_state
    if_state --> Moving: if speed > 0
    if_state --> Stopped: if speed == 0
    %% Notes
    note right of Moving
        Moving fast
    end note
    note left of Still
        Completely still
    end note
    %% Concurrency
    state Concurrent {
        [*] --> A
        --
        [*] --> B
    }
er:
erDiagram
    %% All cardinalities
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
    CUSTOMER }|..|{ DELIVERY-ADDRESS : uses
    PRODUCT ||--o| CATEGORY : "belongs to"
    ORDER }o--o{ PRODUCT : includes
    %% Self-loop
    EMPLOYEE }|--|{ EMPLOYEE : manages
    %% Entities with all attribute types
    CUSTOMER {
        int id PK
        string name
        string email UK
        int category_id FK
        date created_at "Registration date"
    }
    ORDER {
        int id PK
        date order_date
        string status
        float total
    }
    LINE-ITEM {
        int order_id FK, PK
        int product_id FK, PK
        int quantity
        float unit_price
    }
    PRODUCT {
        int id PK
        string name
        float price
        string description
    }
    CATEGORY {
        int id PK
        string name
    }
    DELIVERY-ADDRESS {
        int id PK
        string street
        string city
        string country
    }
    EMPLOYEE {
        int id PK
        string name
        int manager_id FK
    }
    %% Identifying vs non-identifying
    ORDER ||..o{ SHIPMENT : ships
    SHIPMENT {
        int id PK
        string tracking
    }
gantt:
gantt
    title Project Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %m/%d
    %% Sections
    section Planning
        Task 1 :done, t1, 2024-01-01, 7d
        Task 2 :active, t2, after t1, 5d
        Milestone :milestone, m1, 2024-01-13, 0d
    section Development
        Task 3 :t3, 2024-01-10, 10d
        Task 4 :crit, t4, after t3, 7d
        Task 5 :crit, done, t5, 2024-01-15, 5d
    section Testing
        Task 6 :t6, after t4, 5d
        Task 7 :t7, after t5, 3d
    section Deployment
        Release :milestone, r1, after t6, 0d
    %% Excludes
    excludes weekends
    %% Tick interval
    tickInterval 1week

git:
gitGraph LR:
    commit id: "Initial"
    commit id: "Add feature"
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit id: "Dev commit 1"
    commit id: "Dev commit 2"
    branch feature/login
    checkout feature/login
    commit id: "Login form"
    commit id: "Login logic"
    checkout develop
    merge feature/login id: "Merge login" tag: "v0.1"
    commit id: "Dev commit 3"
    branch hotfix
    checkout hotfix
    commit id: "Critical fix" type: HIGHLIGHT
    checkout main
    merge hotfix id: "Hotfix merge" tag: "v0.1.1"
    checkout develop
    merge hotfix
    commit id: "Continue dev" type: REVERSE
    checkout main
    merge develop id: "Release" tag: "v0.2"

C4Context

block:
block-beta
    columns 3
    %% Basic blocks
    A["Rectangle"]
    B("Round")
    C(["Stadium"])
    %% Arrow blocks
    blockArrowId1<["Arrow Down"]>(down)
    blockArrowId2<["Arrow Right"]>(right)
    %% Spaces
    space
    D["D"]
    space
    %% Compound blocks
    block:group1
        E["E"]
        F["F"]
    end
    %% Styled
    G["Styled"]
    %% Edges
    A --> D
    B --> D
    C --> G
    style G fill:#f00,color:#fff
    %% Database shape
    H[("DB")]
    H --> D

    0-15: "Source Port"
    16-31: "Destination Port"
    32-63: "Sequence Number"
    64-95: "Acknowledgment Number"
    96-99: "Data Offset"
    100-105: "Reserved"
    106: "URG"
    107: "ACK"
    108: "PSH"
    109: "RST"
    110: "SYN"
    111: "FIN"
    112-127: "Window Size"
    128-143: "Checksum"
    144-159: "Urgent Pointer"
    160-191: "Options (variable)"
    192-255: "Data"

anchor User [0.95, 0.78]
component Website [0.79, 0.61] label [19, -4]
component Database [0.63, 0.81]
component Auth [0.73, 0.78]
component CDN [0.43, 0.35] label [-57, 4]
component Cloud [0.1, 0.7] label [-27, 20]

User -> Website
Website -> Database
Website -> Auth
Website -> CDN
CDN -> Cloud
